description: Fetches a list of trending games on the Steam platform with live data.

returns.description: A list of currently trending Steam games with summary details.

description: Fetches a list of top selling games from Steam with live sales data.

returns.description: A list of Steam's top selling games with sales information.

description: Fetches a list of most played games on Steam with live player statistics.

returns.description: A list of the most played Steam games with real-time player count.

description: Fetches data on current and upcoming free games available in the Epic Games Store.

returns.description: List of all free and promotional games on Epic Games Store.

description: Fetches a list of trending games from the Epic Games Store.

returns.description: A list of top trending games from the Epic Games Store.

description: Fetches a combined real-time list of trending games from Steam and Epic Games Store.

returns.description: Consolidated list of trending games from multiple platforms including Steam and Epic.

description: Checks the health and operational status of the Gaming Trend Analytics API.

returns.description: API status and health check response.
